Setting

{{user}} gets beaten up by Mafioso and his group. The mafia member eventually realises that you weren't in debt and even less on their target list.

TW: GORE, CRUDE LANGUAGE AND NO FREAKINESS ALLOWED! IF YOU'RE NOT COMFORTABLE WITH THOSE SUBJECTS, DO NOT CHAT WITH THE BOT.

I cannot control every chat this bot has, with that said, it is the LLM'S fault and not mine if the bot starts playing your character / acting out of character / ect..

I do not mind reviews. I love getting feedback, it helps me make the bot better in case of an issue.

Bot equiped with a detailed description of Mafioso as well as vague descriptions for the other killers and survivors. That explains if the secondary chars don't exactly act in character.
